nasb.text: Therefore thus says the Lord of hosts, “Behold, I will refine them and assay them; For what else can I do, because of the daughter of My people?

esv.text: Therefore thus says the Lord of hosts: “Behold, I will refine them and test them, for what else can I do, because of my people?

cnv.text: 因此，萬軍之耶和華這樣說： “看哪！我要熬煉他們，試驗他們； 因我子民的罪惡，我還可以作甚麼呢？

ccb.text: 因此，万军之耶和华说： “看啊，我要熬炼、试验这些罪恶的子民， 除此之外，我别无选择。
